headlines.h: Opinion: Know the signs (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Weather Alert: s e r e n i t y
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Me after eating one tiny sweet thing"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: It's still just a bird
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
